description_long: This apartment building features a striking modern design with sweeping, curved white facades and prominent horizontal bands that wrap around the structure. The building has multiple levels, including rooftop terraces with outdoor furniture and landscaped areas, as well as balconies with glass railings. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows are arranged in a linear fashion, allowing for ample natural light and a sense of openness. The ground level includes a landscaped entry path, a small garden, and a covered outdoor seating area. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a mix of greenery and hardscape elements enhancing the urban appeal.
description: A sleek, modern apartment building with curved white facades, large windows, balconies, and rooftop terraces, surrounded by landscaped gardens and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, curved white facade, balconies, rooftop terrace, landscaped path, and a covered outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear arrangement of windows, multiple balconies, rooftop terrace with furniture, and extensive use of white horizontal bands.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by solid gray walls with minimal windows, emphasizing privacy and structural mass.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's layered structure, projecting balconies, and a mix of solid and open elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in horizontal bands, with large, evenly spaced panes on the main facade and fewer, more isolated windows on the sides and rear, creating a balanced yet asymmetrical look.
